ProductLaunchFormula.com 	© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
BONUS – SWIPE FILES
BONUS SWIPE FILES OVERVIEW
In this BONUS section, you’ll find swipe copy from a variety of steps discussed in the
training including:
o 	Pre-Prelaunch emails
o 	Quick Launch Examples
o 	Internal Launch Examples
o 	Internal with JV Launch Examples
o 	AND a sample spreadsheet used to track your launch sequences
Good copy is timeless and the lessons still apply regardless of when the campaigns were
developed so don’t be thrown off by the dates on the swipe copy provided.
Because the swipe copy includes the actual copy used, many of the links won’t work but they
remain as placeholders so you can see how the copy flows and the URLs were set up (no
need to email customer service about broken links.)
Here is what you’ll find in this section:
PRE-PRElaunch Examples
¨ Email Query (Swipe for 3 emails)
¨ Reluctant Hero (Swipe for 1 email and a walkthrough of the copy)
Quick Launch Examples
¨ Tax Sale (Swipe for 4 emails)
¨ Go Romance (ZIP file with Swipe for 9 emails)
¨ Wild Craft (Swipe for 4 emails)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
